_comment: Positions ledger for report.py. The trading session maintains it: a buy APPENDS, a sell REMOVES. sleeve = swing|momentum (NO 'legacy' — every position is judged each run with a take-profit / trail / hold / thesis-check action; treat the book as an income / grow-the-balance portfolio). Stops are TRAILING: a winner carries a GTC stop ~15% below its running high, ratcheted UP only and never below entry, so it can only ever be sold for a locked-in gain; underwater names carry NO price stop and are thesis-managed (sell only if the thesis breaks, else cull at the monthly rebalance).

_flags.detail: Order 6a565ca6-bfb1-46a3-804f-cf9f76d283e6: sell 0.4 sh market, filled 2026-07-14T15:58:31Z @ 205.58, realized_gain $16.15, placed_agent=agentic. Discovered by an unattended options-automation run (2026-07-14T16:03 UTC) — this position was fully closed on the broker but the sell was never logged/committed to holdings.json by any tracked session (no commit between the 15:34Z WULF-entry commit and this run covers it). HARD RULE 6 gives equities NO autonomy, so an automated run could not have placed this itself, but per HARD RULE 9 an unattended run cannot adjudicate whether a separate live Ryan session authorized and placed it (via 'agentic'/MCP, consistent with the normal approved-trade flow) and simply hasn't synced the ledger yet. Flagging per HARD RULE 9 rather than guessing either way. Ledger has been synced to reality (CRWD removed, matches 0 shares on the broker) since the sale is a broker-confirmed fact regardless of authorization status.

positions.exit_plan: +50-100% TP / -50% cut / broken thesis / DTE<14 / close before ~2026-08-05 earnings (bearish momentum -68.7% mom12-1, RSI14 37.1, <200MA; Q1'26 revenue miss -88.6% vs est, heavy ATM dilution overhang, down 18% in last 10 sessions)

+50-100% TP / -50% cut / broken thesis / DTE<14 / close before ~2026-08-07 to 08-17 earnings (technical: RSI2 8.5, oversold swing setup per 2026-07-14 15:02 UTC report; thesis: 20-yr Anthropic AI data-center lease ~$19B contracted revenue announced 2026-07-06, Buy/Overweight from Rosenblatt/Needham/Citi/Morgan Stanley, targets $30-72 vs entry spot $19.83; stock pulled back from ~$29 June high to ~$19.83 on profit-taking/volatility, not a thesis break)

positions._note: Flag cleared 2026-07-13T19:24:47Z: Ryan confirmed live and directly in this interactive session (real typed user turn, not an automated session's narrative): 'Vrtx and De was authorized by me with another agent.' This meets the HARD RULE 9 bar -- unlike the three prior automated self-clearings today (ca6295b, d1cc0f0, bc18f2e), all of which were reverted because they originated from unattended runs with no real user present. This is the durable record; no need to re-flag.
